$comment: Sortie exercise catalogue. Equipment keys must stay consistent with data/equipment.json. movementPatterns uses the closed set: push, pull, hinge, squat, carry, core, cardio. spineCandidate marks the lifts that anchor the slow-rotating Spine (back squat, deadlift, bench, OHP, weighted pull-up, barbell row, hip thrust, plus the front-squat / RDL variants used as spine substitutes).

exercises.name: Back squat
exercises.cue: Brace, sit between the hips, knees track toes.

exercises.name: Front squat
exercises.cue: Elbows high, ribs down, vertical torso.

exercises.name: Conventional deadlift
exercises.cue: Bar over mid-foot, lats tight, push the floor away.

exercises.name: Romanian deadlift
exercises.cue: Hips back, bar grazes thighs, soft knees.

exercises.name: Bench press
exercises.cue: Shoulder blades pinned, bar to lower chest, drive up and slightly back.

exercises.name: Overhead press
exercises.cue: Squeeze glutes, bar over mid-foot at lockout, head through.

exercises.name: Weighted pull-up
exercises.cue: Full hang, drive elbows down, chest to bar.

exercises.name: Barbell row
exercises.cue: Hinge to ~45°, pull bar to lower ribs, no shrug.

exercises.name: Hip thrust
exercises.cue: Ribs down, glutes drive, full lockout.

exercises.name: Goblet squat
exercises.cue: Bell at chest, elbows inside knees, full depth.

exercises.name: Bulgarian split squat
exercises.cue: Rear foot on bench, vertical shin on front leg.

exercises.name: Pistol squat
exercises.cue: Slow descent, free leg straight, heel down.

exercises.name: Dumbbell step-up
exercises.cue: Drive through the heel of the planted foot; no push-off.

exercises.name: Reverse lunge
exercises.cue: Step back, drop the back knee, drive up through the front heel.

exercises.name: Walking lunge
exercises.cue: Long stride, vertical torso, soft back knee tap.

exercises.name: Kettlebell swing
exercises.cue: Hike the bell, snap the hips, arms float.

exercises.name: Single-leg Romanian deadlift
exercises.cue: Hips square, slow hinge, no rotation.

exercises.name: Kettlebell deadlift
exercises.cue: Bell between feet, hinge first, push the floor.

exercises.name: Good morning
exercises.cue: Soft knees, hinge with neutral spine, hamstrings load.

exercises.name: Dumbbell bench press
exercises.cue: Slight arch, control the descent, press in slight arc.

exercises.name: Dumbbell shoulder press
exercises.cue: Ribs down, press to lockout above the crown.

exercises.name: Dumbbell floor press
exercises.cue: Pause elbows on the floor, then press.

exercises.name: Push-up
exercises.cue: Plank line, elbows ~45°, chest to floor.

exercises.name: Diamond push-up
exercises.cue: Hands together, elbows tight to ribs.

exercises.name: Pike push-up
exercises.cue: Hips high, head between hands at the bottom.

exercises.name: Dips
exercises.cue: Shoulders down, lean slightly forward for chest emphasis.

exercises.name: Pull-up
exercises.cue: Full hang, drive elbows down and back.

exercises.name: Chin-up
exercises.cue: Supinated grip, chest to bar.

exercises.name: Inverted row
exercises.cue: Body rigid, pull chest to bar, elbows ~45°.

exercises.name: Dumbbell row
exercises.cue: Long spine, row to the hip, no twist.

exercises.name: Single-arm dumbbell row
exercises.cue: Hand and knee on bench, row tight to the ribs.

exercises.name: Band pull-apart
exercises.cue: Straight arms, squeeze the mid-back, no shrug.

exercises.name: Face pull
exercises.cue: High elbows, pull to forehead, external rotation.

exercises.name: Farmer's carry
exercises.cue: Tall posture, ribs down, deliberate steps.

exercises.name: Suitcase carry
exercises.cue: No lean — resist the side bend.

exercises.name: Overhead carry
exercises.cue: Locked elbow, ribs down, eyes forward.

exercises.name: Front-rack carry
exercises.cue: Bells stacked on shoulders, breathe through the brace.

exercises.name: Sandbag carry
exercises.cue: Bear-hug high on the chest, full breaths, walk tall.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.cue: Straight line ear-to-ankle, glutes and quads on.

exercises.name: Side plank
exercises.cue: Hips stacked, top hip high, breathe.

exercises.name: Dead bug
exercises.cue: Lower back glued to the floor, slow opposite limbs.

exercises.name: Bird dog
exercises.cue: Reach long, no rotation through the hips.

exercises.name: Hollow hold
exercises.cue: Low back pressed down, ribs tucked.

exercises.name: Hanging knee raise
exercises.cue: Initiate from the pelvis, no swing.

exercises.name: Hanging leg raise
exercises.cue: Toes to bar, controlled descent.

exercises.name: Pallof press
exercises.cue: Resist rotation, press straight out from the chest.

exercises.name: Easy run
exercises.cue: Nose-breathing pace, conversational throughout.

exercises.name: Long run
exercises.cue: Aerobic only — finish feeling you could go further.

exercises.name: Tempo run
exercises.cue: Comfortably hard — sustainable for ~30 min.

exercises.name: Interval run
exercises.cue: Even splits across reps; equal-time recovery.

exercises.name: Hill repeats
exercises.cue: Drive the knees, jog back down to fully recover.

exercises.name: Treadmill steady
exercises.cue: 1% incline, hold pace, smooth cadence.

exercises.name: Treadmill intervals
exercises.cue: Step on/off at speed; respect the recoveries.

exercises.name: Easy swim
exercises.cue: Long strokes, exhale steady, glide.

exercises.name: Threshold swim
exercises.cue: Hold the fastest pace you can sustain across the set.

exercises.name: Sprint swim set
exercises.cue: All-out reps, full recovery between.

exercises.name: Pull set
exercises.cue: Pull buoy, focus on catch and high elbow.

exercises.name: Kick set
exercises.cue: Compact kick from the hips, board out front.

exercises.name: Open water swim
exercises.cue: Sight every 6–8 strokes, steady aerobic effort.

exercises.name: Easy bike
exercises.cue: Zone 2 — you can hold a conversation.

exercises.name: Tempo bike
exercises.cue: Sustained effort just below threshold.

exercises.name: Sweet-spot intervals
exercises.cue: 88–94% FTP, steady cadence, even output.

exercises.name: VO2 bike intervals
exercises.cue: Hard reps, equal-time recovery, hold form.

exercises.name: Long ride
exercises.cue: Aerobic effort, fuel regularly, steady cadence.

exercises.name: Bike hill repeats
exercises.cue: Stay seated where possible, drive the down-stroke.

exercises.name: Burpee
exercises.cue: Chest to floor, jump and clap at the top.

exercises.name: Mountain climber
exercises.cue: Plank line, drive knees fast.

exercises.name: Jump rope
exercises.cue: Quiet feet, wrists turn the rope.

exercises.name: Bear crawl
exercises.cue: Knees hover, opposite hand and foot, low and quiet.

exercises.name: Kettlebell snatch
exercises.cue: Pull high, punch through at the top, soft catch.

exercises.name: Kettlebell clean
exercises.cue: Hike, elbow tight, bell rolls onto the shoulder.

exercises.name: Dumbbell thruster
exercises.cue: Drive out of the squat, finish overhead in one motion.

exercises.name: Box jump
exercises.cue: Land soft and quiet — step back down.

exercises.name: Sled push
exercises.cue: Low body angle, short steady steps.

exercises.name: Rower intervals
exercises.cue: Legs–hips–arms; reverse on the recovery.

exercises.name: Ski-erg intervals
exercises.cue: Drive down with the hips, finish past the knees.

exercises.name: Wall ball
exercises.cue: Full squat, target the top of the line, catch into the next rep.

exercises.name: Glute bridge
exercises.cue: Heels close, ribs down, squeeze glutes at the top.

exercises.name: Wall sit
exercises.cue: Thighs parallel, hold the breath calm.

exercises.name: Terminal knee extension
exercises.cue: Band behind the knee, lock the knee straight, slow return.

exercises.name: Banded clam
exercises.cue: Side-lying, knees apart against the band, no hip roll.

exercises.name: Scapular pull-up
exercises.cue: Dead hang, depress and retract the scapulae only — no elbow bend.

exercises.name: Band external rotation
exercises.cue: Elbow tucked to ribs, rotate slowly, control the return.

exercises.name: Wall slide
exercises.cue: Forearms on the wall, slide up keeping contact throughout.

exercises.name: Prone Y-T-W
exercises.cue: Thumbs up, lift from the mid-back, hold each rep briefly.

exercises.name: Cat-cow
exercises.cue: Slow, paired with the breath — segment by segment.

exercises.name: 90/90 hip switch
exercises.cue: Sit tall, rotate the hips side to side, both knees stay grounded.
